title: Chart Type Gallery
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Data Visualization
description: Interactive gallery of 14 chart types with thumbnails, details panel, filtering by library, and quiz mode for recognition practice.

learningObjectives: Identify the 14 chart types by viewing example renderings
Recall which data characteristics each chart type communicates best

pedagogical.teachingStrategy: Visual gallery with recognition practice and quiz mode
keyQuestions: Which chart type would you choose for showing trends over time?
When is a pie chart appropriate vs. a bar chart?
What distinguishes a histogram from a bar chart?
commonMisconceptions: Histograms and bar charts are the same thing
Pie charts work well with many categories
Scatter plots can show categorical data
